title: prospero lingulatum
intro: Prospero lingulatum, also known as Toothbrush Tree, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Prospero lingulatum include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
